_comment: Source-of-truth manifest for externally-sourced skills. Drives skills-workflow.ipynb's Phase 2 (update) and Phase 4 (distribute). 'last_synced_sha' is informational and is stamped by the notebook when an update is applied.

excluded.name: caveman
excluded.reason: Locally modified to suit personal use; do not auto-update. (Origin: Matt Pocock, MIT.)

excluded.name: domain-modeling
excluded.reason: Locally modified; do not auto-update. (Origin: Matt Pocock, MIT — github.com/mattpocock/skills, skills/engineering/domain-modeling.) Forked 2026-07-10 to target .ai/CONTEXT.md / .ai/adr/ instead of upstream's root-level CONTEXT.md / docs/adr/, to stay inside this repo's .ai/ Standard; also added a rule to check for an existing HISD-glossary owner before adding a term. grill-with-docs (still tracked normally) delegates to this skill, matching upstream's own architecture.

excluded.name: pbi-visual-rendering
excluded.reason: Own skill (Benjamin Hanna / Houston ISD).

excluded.name: semantic-modeling-prepforai
excluded.reason: Own skill (Benjamin Hanna / Houston ISD). Deprecated as an actively-invoked skill 2026-07-10 in favor of global SessionStart/PostToolUse hooks (see references/global-hooks.md) — its HISD-specific content is consolidated in references/hisd-power-bi-context.md. Folder retained (not deleted) because it's still the distribution vehicle to ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.agents/skills/, which the hooks read from.

excluded.name: github-mastery
excluded.reason: Own skill (Benjamin Hanna / Houston ISD).

excluded.name: memory-architect
excluded.reason: Own skill (Benjamin Hanna / Houston ISD). Repo footprint grew beyond a single SKILL.md this round (2026-07-10): agents/memory-consolidator.md, hooks/validation-gate.js, scripts/detect-structure.js, four references/*.md files — now warrants the same tracking as github-mastery.
